tagline: Roblox scripts that stay updated without babysitting.
features: Finds the right script when you inject
WindUI with live status on each game
Ban checks against Roblox UserId, username, and HWID
Site and scripts pull from GitHub automatically
Game status comes from real inject data, not guesses
Updates land within about a minute of a push
Live executor compatibility via WEAO — every major exploit tracked

faq.q: How do I open the site?
faq.a: Any browser works - phone or PC. Grab the link from Share and bookmark it if you want. You don't need a Roblox account just to browse. Roblox and an executor only matter when you run the loadstring.
Copy the loadstring from the homepage, paste it into your executor, and run it in a supported game. It downloads from GitHub on its own.
Check the Games tab - status updates live. Scripts only load when a game is marked Working or Testing.
Usually it's the wrong game, a weak executor, or the game is marked Broken/Maintenance. If you see a ban message, your account or device is blocked on the server.
Yeah. The loader checks GitHub every ~45 seconds and reloads when something new is pushed.

faq.q: How does the ban system work?
faq.a: Before the script loads, Alleral checks your Roblox UserId, username, HWID, fingerprint, IP, and executor against the ban list on Railway. Client-side bypass won't work.

faq.q: How do I report a bug?
faq.a: Use the Support section below. Reports go straight to Discord.

changelog.title: WindUI revamp
items: Replaced Obsidian with WindUI across all game scripts
Alleral green accent on the open button and dark theme default
Same script API — toggles, sliders, dropdowns, and live status panels

changelog.title: Ban API rework
items: Ban by Roblox username (resolves to UserId server-side)
Cascade across UserId, username, HWID, and fingerprint
Ban check now sends placeId and universeId from the game
